text:
The paper exists and is verified across multiple sources. 
The real authors of this paper are **Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, and Tengyu Ma**.
 The cited reference lists "Aviral Kumar" as Author 2, which does not appear in the actual author list at all. Aviral Kumar is a different researcher who appears only in the paper's reference list as a co-author of a *different* cited work. This is a classic author-grafting hallucination: the real paper exists, but the cited author list is fabricated.

EXPLANATION: The paper "MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization" is real and published at NeurIPS 2020, but the cited author "Aviral Kumar" does not appear in the actual author list (Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Tengyu Ma); the cited author list is fabricated.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2005.13239
FOUND_TITLE: MOPO: Model-based Offline Policy Optimization
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianhe Yu, Garrett Thomas, Lantao Yu, Stefano Ermon, James Zou, Sergey Levine, Chelsea Finn, Tengyu Ma
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: LIKELY
